description: Cross-repo contract for the georeferenced observation envelope POSTed to Factlas at POST /api/v1/observations. Producers (e.g. Eido capture handoffs) must emit exactly this shape; Factlas validates it as ObservationCreate. Changing this file is a cross-repo act: update the canonical copy and BOTH vendored copies in the same change set. Additive fields stay within v1; bump version only for breaking shape changes.
auth: Janua bearer (RS256, verified via JWKS). Service principals authenticate with an OAuth2 client_credentials token — Factlas require_user accepts any valid Janua token with a sub.

properties.description: Free-form metadata (producer-specific; e.g. eido_id, mesh_url, title, altitude_m)

notes.additionalProperties: Set to false as the canonical target. Factlas's current Pydantic ObservationCreate IGNORES unknown top-level fields rather than rejecting them, so producers must not rely on extra fields carrying through — nest producer-specific data under `properties`.
notes.provider: Eido emits provider='eido'; Factlas's own default is 'api_user'.
notes.h3: Factlas derives observation.h3_8 server-side (real H3, app-layer) from lat/lon — producers do NOT send it (factlas#16).
